# bufferBaseAddress()

**Instance Method**

Returns the base address of the image buffer.

## Declaration

```swift
func bufferBaseAddress() -> UnsafeRawPointer!
```

## Return Value

The base address of the buffer.

## Discussion

The base address is guaranteed to be aligned on a 16-byte boundary.

## Getting Image Buffer Information

- **imageBounds()**: Returns the actual bounds of the image source expressed in pixels and aligned to integer boundaries.
- **bufferPixelsWide()**: Returns the width of the image buffer representation.
- **bufferPixelsHigh()**: Returns the height of the image buffer representation.
- **bufferPixelFormat()**: Returns the pixel format of the image buffer representation.
- **bufferColorSpace()**: Returns the color space of the image buffer representation.
- **bufferBytesPerRow()**: Returns the  bytes per row of the buffer representation.
